seoTitle: Gunderman vs Gundy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gunderman and Gundy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gunderman and Gundy.
heading: Gunderman vs Gundy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gunderman, New South Wales and Gundy, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gunderman has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Gundy (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gunderman or Gundy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gunderman has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Gundy scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gunderman scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Gundy scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gunderman or Gundy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gunderman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
